SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.interval

Class AIsIntervalUtils

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AIsIntervalUtils
public final class AIsIntervalUtils extends Object

Title: AIsIntervalUtils

Description: Utility methods for working with AIiInterval instances.

The utilities are designed for generic comparable values, including version objects that implement Comparable.

Date:
26.01.26

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends Comparable>
    int
    compare(AIiInterval<T> aLeft, AIiInterval<T> aRight)
    Compares two intervals by their left endpoints, then by right endpoints.
    static <T extends Comparable>
    boolean
    contains(AIiInterval<T> aInterval, T aValue)
    Returns true if aValue is contained in aInterval.
    static <T extends Comparable>
    AIcInterval<T>
    intersect(AIiInterval<T> aLeft, AIiInterval<T> aRight)
    Computes intersection of two intervals.
    static boolean
    isLeftUnbounded(AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
     
    static boolean
    isRightUnbounded(AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
     
    static <T extends Comparable>
    boolean
    isSatisfiable(AIiInterval<T> aInterval)
    Returns true if an interval is satisfiable (not empty) based on its endpoints.
    static <T extends Comparable>
    boolean
    isStrictlyBefore(AIiInterval<T> aLeft, AIiInterval<T> aRight)
    Returns true if aLeft is strictly before aRight (no overlap and left ends before right starts).
    static <T extends Comparable>
    boolean
    overlaps(AIiInterval<T> aLeft, AIiInterval<T> aRight)
    Returns true if two intervals overlap (have a non-empty intersection).
    static String
    toStringRepresentation(AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
    Produces a concise string representation using boundary symbols.
    static <T extends Comparable>
    AIcInterval<T>
    tryIntersect(AIiInterval<T> aLeft, AIiInterval<T> aRight)
    Attempts to compute intersection of two intervals.
    static void
    validateInterval(AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
    Validates the interval against the contract of AIiInterval and basic ordering rules.

  • Method Details

    • validateInterval

      public static void validateInterval(@Nonnull AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
      Validates the interval against the contract of AIiInterval and basic ordering rules.
      Parameters:
      aInterval - interval to validate

    • isLeftUnbounded

      public static boolean isLeftUnbounded(@Nonnull AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
      Parameters:
      aInterval - interval
      Returns:
      true if left side is unbounded

    • isRightUnbounded

      public static boolean isRightUnbounded(@Nonnull AIiInterval<?> aInterval)
      Parameters:
      aInterval - interval
      Returns:
      true if right side is unbounded

    • contains

      public static <T extends Comparable> boolean contains(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aInterval, @Nonnull T aValue)
      Returns true if aValue is contained in aInterval.
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aInterval - interval
      aValue - value
      Returns:
      true if contained

    • overlaps

      public static <T extends Comparable> boolean overlaps(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aLeft, @Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aRight)
      Returns true if two intervals overlap (have a non-empty intersection).
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aLeft - first interval
      aRight - second interval
      Returns:
      true if overlap exists

    • intersect

      @Nonnull public static <T extends Comparable> AIcInterval<T> intersect(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aLeft, @Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aRight)
      Computes intersection of two intervals.
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aLeft - first interval
      aRight - second interval
      Returns:
      intersection
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when intervals do not overlap

    • tryIntersect

      @Nullable public static <T extends Comparable> AIcInterval<T> tryIntersect(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aLeft, @Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aRight)
      Attempts to compute intersection of two intervals.
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aLeft - first interval
      aRight - second interval
      Returns:
      intersection or null if no overlap

    • isSatisfiable

      public static <T extends Comparable> boolean isSatisfiable(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aInterval)
      Returns true if an interval is satisfiable (not empty) based on its endpoints.
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aInterval - interval
      Returns:
      true if satisfiable

      Returns:

    • isStrictlyBefore

      public static <T extends Comparable> boolean isStrictlyBefore(@Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aLeft, @Nonnull AIiInterval<T> aRight)
      Returns true if aLeft is strictly before aRight (no overlap and left ends before right starts).
      Type Parameters:
      T - value type
      Parameters:
      aLeft - left interval
      aRight - right interval
      Returns:
      true if strictly before
